name: fleet operations managers in logistics carriers managing 10-50 vehicles tool
description: For fleet operations managers in logistics carriers managing 10-50 vehicles, inefficient tracking of vehicle maintenance and fuel usage causes increased operational costs. We provide a streamlined tracking tool instead of manual spreadsheets and paper logs.
target_audience: fleet operations managers in logistics carriers managing 10-50 vehicles
problem_solved: inefficient tracking of vehicle maintenance and fuel usage
